---
name: "Bug Report"
about: "Help us improve KwaValidator by reporting an issue."
title: "[BUG] Brief description of the error"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 💻 Platform / Language
- [ ] Node.js (npm)
- [ ] .NET (NuGet)
- [ ] Python (pip)

**Library Version:** (e.g., 1.0.2)

## 📝 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the error is.

## 🔢 Data Example
Provide the document (ID/BI, NIF, etc.) that caused the unexpected behavior:
`Example: 001234567LA045`

## 🚀 Expected Behavior
What should have happened? (e.g., It should have returned `isValid: true` but returned `false`).

## 📸 Screenshots (If applicable)
If it's a compilation or console error, add images here.

## 🛠️ Environment
- **OS:** [e.g., Windows, Linux, macOS]
- **Language Version:** [e.g., Node v20, .NET 8, 9, 10, Python 3.11]

## 🧐 Additional Context
Any extra information on how the error occurs (e.g., it only happens in Online mode).
